question_text: A student has a mass of 60 kg. On which planet would they experience the strongest gravitational pull? (Assume: Mercury g = 3.7 N/kg, Venus g = 8.9 N/kg, Earth g = 10 N/kg, Saturn g = 9.0 N/kg)
explanation: Earth has the highest gravitational field strength at 10 N/kg from the options given, so the student would weigh most there and feel the strongest pull of gravity. You can calculate actual weights using W = m × g for each planet.
